title: Writing Effective Prompts
concept: Effective prompts describe subject, style, composition, and detail explicitly, since the model has no other context beyond the text it's given.

exercises.prompt: If you asked an AI to draw 'a bird' with no other details, what would happen?

options.text: It would guess what kind of bird, color, and style since you didn't say
It would refuse to draw anything at all
It would draw every bird species at once

exercises.explain: AI fills in gaps with guesses. The more details you leave out, the more it has to invent on its own!

cards.title: Why Do Some Prompts Just... Work?
cards.body: Ever typed a prompt and gotten something amazing, then typed another and gotten something totally random? The secret isn't luck — it's how clearly you describe what you want. Today you'll learn to write prompts that actually get you what's in your head!

cards.title: What Makes a Prompt 'Effective'?
cards.body: An effective prompt clearly describes the SUBJECT (what/who), the STYLE (how it looks, like cartoon or realistic), the COMPOSITION (how things are arranged, like close-up or wide shot), and the DETAILS (colors, mood, lighting). The AI only knows what you tell it in words — it can't read your mind!

cards.title: Ordering Pizza Over the Phone
cards.body: Imagine calling a pizza place and just saying 'pizza please.' You might get plain cheese when you wanted pepperoni with extra cheese, thin crust, cut into squares! A good order describes exactly what you want. Prompting an AI is the same — you have to say the toppings, size, and style out loud, because the person on the phone can't see inside your head.

cards.title: Weak vs Strong Prompt
cards.body:
Weak: 'A dog.' The AI has to guess breed, color, setting, and style.

Strong: 'A fluffy golden retriever puppy sitting in a grassy park, cartoon style, bright sunny afternoon, close-up shot.' Now the AI knows the subject, style, composition, and details — and can create exactly what you imagined.

cards.title: Myth: AI Just 'Knows' What You Mean
cards.body: Truth: AI has zero context beyond your exact words. It doesn't know your favorite colors, your mental image, or what 'nice' or 'cool' means to you. Vague words like 'nice photo' get vague results. Being specific isn't extra work — it's the whole trick!

cards.title: Vague vs Detailed Prompt
cards.body: Same idea, very different results depending on how much info you give the AI.

left.text: 'A castle.' Result: random style, random colors, random angle — a total guess.

right.text: 'A tall stone castle on a cliff at sunset, watercolor style, wide shot with orange sky.' Result: matches your vision closely.

exercises.prompt: Which of these is part of writing an effective prompt?

options.text: Describing the subject, style, composition, and details
Using as few words as possible, always
Letting the AI guess your favorite color
Only naming the subject and nothing else

exercises.explain: Effective prompts spell out subject, style, composition, and detail — leaving less room for guessing.

exercises.prompt: True or False: The AI can understand what you want even if you don't describe it, because it can read your intentions.
exercises.explain: False! The AI only has the words you give it. It cannot read minds — no text means no information.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank to complete the idea about prompting.
exercises.sentence: A strong prompt describes the subject, style, composition, and ___ so the AI has less to guess.
exercises.explain: Details like color, lighting, and mood help the AI create exactly what you pictured.

exercises.prompt: Which prompt is most likely to give you a clear, specific result?

options.text: 'A red sports car speeding down a rainy city street at night, realistic style, wide-angle shot.'

exercises.explain: The second option names the subject, style, composition, and details — giving the AI a clear picture to follow.

exercises.prompt: You want an AI to create an image of exactly what's in your imagination: a small wooden treehouse. What should you do to write an effective prompt?

options.text: Just type 'treehouse' and hope it matches your imagination
Describe the subject (treehouse), style (like realistic or cartoon), composition (angle/shot), and details (colors, setting, time of day)
Type in all capital letters so the AI understands better
Avoid describing anything so the AI can be creative on its own

exercises.explain: Since the AI only knows your words, spelling out the subject, style, composition, and details gives it everything it needs to match your imagination.
